_comment: Per-pipeline coarse bids-filter inputs for the `select` stage. `anat_acquisition` is the canonical T1w acq label (SagMPRAGE; the legacy MPRAGEPromo is skipped at curation, see curation.py::SKIP_ACQUISITIONS). `tasks` mirrors the functional task set of curation.py::ACQUISITION_MAP (9 single + 11 dual). network_fmri shells `network-qa render bids-filter` with these to write code/bids-filter_<pipeline>.json. This is the COARSE pass-1 filter (canonical anat + all valid task bolds); surgical per-scan quality exclusions live in the compiled lockfile and are enforced downstream (lev1), not here.
